title: Home Depot stock sinks after sales miss and downbeat outlook, offsetting profit beat and dividend hike
text: Shares of Home Depot Inc. HD, -1.02% dropped 2.8% toward a three-month low in premarket trading Tuesday, after the home improvement retail giant reported fiscal fourth-quarter sales that missed and provided a downbeat outlook, citing persistent inflation, continued supply chain disruptions and a tight labor market. Net income edged up to $3.36 billion, or $3.30 a share, from $3.35 billion, or $3.21 a share, in the year-ago period.
